tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]Gm[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab]   [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]
Yo listen up here's a story[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]             [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]
About a little guy that lives in a blue world[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Cm[/ch]
And all day and all night and everything he sees[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gm[/ch]
Is just blue[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Cm[/ch]
Like him inside and outside[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Cm[/ch]
Blue his house with a blue little window[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
And a blue Corvette[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch]
And everything is blue for him[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]
And himself and everybody around[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]
Cause he ain't got nobody to listen[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]
